teams.name: Troll Toll For The Boys Hole

alerts: You're 6-7 (7th seed) and HOT - won your last two (W2). The 4th playoff spot is 4 games back with 8 weeks left; a strong run puts you right in it.
MP14 is vs Reaper's Playground (4-9) - your softest matchup. MUST-WIN. Lean into pitching volume: you roster THREE two-start arms this week (E-Rod, Eury Perez, Gage Jump).
ACTIVATE Eury Perez - he's sitting in your IL slot but he's healthy and has TWO starts this week (Tue @COL, Sun @ATH). Move him to a P slot or you lose those starts.

Gage Jump has rounded into form (L30 75) and has TWO starts this week (vLAD, vMIA) - start him, don't drop him. Want more pitching? Sean Burke (FA) is a clean two-start streamer (@BAL, @CLE) over a cold arm.
Roster moves paid off: Brooks Lee (197) fills the 3B hole and Robbie Ray (182) adds strikeouts. Yelich and Riley are gone. Your core - Wood, Ohtani, Gilbert, Reynolds, Abrams - is genuinely strong.

TODAY: Win MP14 vs Reaper's (4-9) - your easiest game; it gets you to 7-7.
Activate Eury Perez off IL (he's healthy, 2 starts this week).
Stream Sean Burke (FA, two starts @BAL/@CLE) if you open a slot from a cold arm - Gage Jump is hot now and stays.
Set your strong nine: Wood, Ohtani(DH), Alonso, Abrams, Turang, Brooks Lee, Moreno, Reynolds, Chourio.
THIS WEEK: Start every two-start arm you roster: E-Rod (vSF, vMIL), Eury Perez (@ATH), Gage Jump (vLAD, vMIA - hot).
Bench Robbie Ray this week - his lone start is @COL (Coors); hold him for ROS strikeouts.
Single-start arms all go: Kirby (vLAA), Ohtani (@ATH), Valdez (@TEX). Check Friday for Gilbert's weekend start.
Keep Williams + Baker active all week for saves.
ALL SEASON: Win the soft spots: Reaper's (MP14), Tennis Racket (MP17) are must-wins.
Stream pitchers every week - fill all 7 P slots with arms that throw; chase innings + Ks.
MP20 vs Garrett (7-6) is your season swing game - both fighting for the same spot.
Target 9-1 down the stretch to reach ~15 wins and steal the 4th seed.

tradeIdeas: Sell a DH-only bat (UTIL-locked) for an elite reliever banking saves + Ks; they need the bat.
OBP is thin in the OF and SP-rich; you add rotation innings.
Reynolds is above his level; Sanchez is a workhorse SP - innings win points leagues.
Turn an OF/UTIL surplus into a closer + a starter; upgrades two active slots.

trollDeal.title: Brother Troll's offer: you give Gilbert + Greene, you get Jordan Walker
trollDeal.verdict: REJECT - you'd ship your ace for a part-time bat. Load it below and the bot will show how lopsided it is.
counters: Keep Gilbert - your most valuable arm.
Offer Yelich instead (he only fits UTIL and is blocked).
Yelich -> MacKenzie Gore is the closest-to-fair brotherly swap (you get SP innings).
If Gilbert must be in it, demand Alex Bregman (fixes 3B) - not Walker.

teamNames.SSs: Troll Toll For The Boys Hole

insights: You project 301 pts vs 236 — a +65 edge and a 77% win projection (best daily lineup from your full roster).
Pitching is your edge: 158 vs 131. With 8 P slots and daily swaps you rotate 10 arms through the week — two-start guys: Gage Jump, Eduardo Rodriguez, Eury Perez.
Hitting slots: you win 6, they win 2, 0 even. Note: no UTIL/DH slot, so DH-only bats can't start (it costs them Schwarber).
Watch their hot bats: Casey Schmitt (L30 79), Otto Lopez (L30 75). Field your best eight every day.
Daily edge: set your lineup every morning - start the arms pitching that day and swap your bench bat in for anyone resting. That's how you bank the full projection.
